fields.name: id: string
fields.description: A unique identifier for the application.

fields.name: description: string
fields.description: A plain text string (no HTML or other formatting) that describes the application while loading.

fields.name: title?: string
fields.description: A short tooltip title of the application.

fields.name: icon?: string
fields.description: The application icon. This can be a URL or an icon class (using the <mark>class://</mark> prefix).

fields.name: shortcut?: boolean
fields.description: Pins this application to menu. The default is true.

fields.name: startup?: boolean
fields.description: Sets whether the application should run on startup. The default is false.
